project_type: Full-stack AI productivity app: Next.js 15 App Router frontend + FastAPI backend
build_system: npm for frontend, pip for backend. No monorepo tooling - separate builds.
test_framework: Jest with jsdom for frontend (passWithNoTests), pytest conceptually for backend (no test runner config found)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run build in frontend/ (must pass). 2. Run npm run lint in frontend/ (must pass). 3. Run python -m py_compile app/main.py in backend/ (must pass).
environment_constraints: Open internet available. No Docker needed. Backend cannot be fully tested without GCP credentials (verify via py_compile only).
contribution_requirements: DO NOT MODIFY: hooks/useChatSocket.ts, lib/api.ts, lib/ws.ts, lib/voice.ts, app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts, middleware.ts, components/Providers.tsx, components/entity/ directory files, mcp-servers/, shared/
key_patterns: CSS variables for theming (--bg, --surface, --border, --text-primary/secondary/tertiary). Framer Motion for animations. Lucide icons. Matte dark theme (no heavy gradients). React context pattern seen in ConnectionContext.tsx. WebSocket messages use {type, content, agent, metadata} format. Backend pushes notifications via ws_manager.send_to_user(). api-extended.ts holds new API helpers. DnD uses @dnd-kit/core with onDragEnd handlers.
directory_structure: frontend/app/ - Next.js App Router pages. frontend/components/ - UI components organized by domain (chat/, layout/, voice/, entity/, ui/, spotify/). frontend/lib/ - API and WS utilities. frontend/hooks/ - Custom React hooks. backend/app/ - FastAPI with agents/, api/, db/, scheduler/, utils/. backend/app/agents/ - AI agent classes. mcp-servers/ - DO NOT MODIFY.
